title: 067  Why we cannot make it after deciding to serve Krishna and not maya
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: The extent to which we are freed from maya or the influence of the material energy, use
the energy is only to the extent that we actually engage in these activities.
Now it's so difficult for somebody who's habituated to sense gratification, all kinds
of materialistic activities, to constantly only engage in chanting Hare Krishna.
That some people try to imitate or try to do that, that if I can remain free from maya
by simply chanting Hare Krishna, let me chant Hare Krishna and that way be free from maya.
You cannot imitate, you cannot do that.
Your mind and body system is conditioned in one way because of which you'll not be able
to constantly chant Hare Krishna.
You'll not be able to constantly do spiritual activity only, that sadhana bhakti, activities
of sadhana bhakti.
You have to do some other activity.
Therefore you have to learn the technique of dovetailing your other activities in your
relationship with Krishna.
How to act in relationship with Krishna as a servant.
How to do everything as devotional service, as service to Krishna.
So that's why you require the guidance of a devotee.
So that's why you require the guidance of a devotee.
So that's why you require the guidance of a devotee.
So that's why you require the guidance of an expert spiritual master.
And that is where sadhana bhakti comes in.
So in the beginning, we cannot imitate the inhabitants of Vrindavan who are simply dovetailed
in all their activities with Krishna and they were guaranteed as Krishna showed them that
they are going to the spiritual world, Vaikuntha Loka, at the end of the life, they'll simply
go to Vaikuntha Loka.
Vaikuntha Loka, there are many different planets even the spiritual sky.
In which the topmost is called GoKula or Goloka Vrindavana.
Because they were attachment with Krishna, they were serving Krishna, their destination
was Krishna Loka.
Which is a topmost planet in spiritual sky even among the spiritual planets.
So even we can go to Krishna Loka.
Even we can dovetail all our activities with Krishna.
Krishna in our relationship with Krishna provided we follow the process of sadhana bhakti because
our present condition is that we are habituated to simply serving Maya so we cannot give up this
service of Maya simply by deciding to stop serving Maya you cannot see you are different from the
mind and body which means you are using your mind and body to serve Maya or to do some service
simply if you decide let me use my mind and body to serve Krishna instead of serving Maya it's not
going to happen it's not going to happen this is called conditioning conditioning means habit
forming we are habituated to serving Maya using our senses
our mind our intelligence our mind body system we are different from that so we
are habituated we have got this and we are habituated to serving Maya with this so even
if you want to serve Krishna your habit will kind of force you somehow to always serve Maya
therefore even in the activities of devotional service even while chanting Hare Krishna by
virtue of your habit your conditioning you will be serving Maya you'll be serving Maya even though
you don't want to serve Maya your intention is not to serve Maya you want to give up the service
of Maya still you'll be serving Maya only even when you're chanting Hare Krishna that is why the
Shastras warn that prematurely somebody tries to sit in a secluded place and chant Hare Krishna
what will they think of they think of women and wealth they're not thinking of women and wealth
they're not think of Krishna so that is the habit that is the conditioning so to get free from the
conditioning there's specific technique acharya's teach there's a way of getting free from this
conditioning so following the rules and regulations in the beginning you have to chant Hare Krishna
follow the rules and regulations and chant Hare Krishna do whatever the spiritual master says
and then if you follow the instructions gradually you'll be changing your habit changing your
conditioning getting free from the conditioning and when your conditioning has gone away when you
have become free from the old habits then you can sit and chant Hare Krishna very nicely and
only think of Krishna not think of you'll not think of women or wealth or Maya
